cookie.text: We use cookies to remember your preferences and improve your experience. By continuing, you agree to our

hero.desc: VikingPal carries Scripture, prayer, and reflection into every hour of your day. Built for those who walk with Christ with the courage of a warrior.

about.title: Faith as Strong as Your Spirit
about.subtitle: VikingPal began as an AI reflection companion with 15 guided categories. It has grown into a complete Christian companion for daily life — carrying Scripture, prayer, worship, and guidance in one calm, reverent place.
about.f1_text: Open the Bible, follow your reading progress, and continue where you left off. Every feature in VikingPal returns to the Word.
about.f2_text: Track prayer habits, keep a prayer journal, and walk 15 guided reflection paths from faith and hope to family and forgiveness.
about.f3_text: Bring your real questions and receive Scripture-shaped guidance tailored directly to your situation and walk of faith.
about.f4_text: Selah brings hymns, Psalms, and instrumentals. Let Go offers a quiet repentance-and-grace experience when burdens feel heavy.
about.f5_text: VikingPal travels with believers everywhere. Broad language support ensures every warrior of faith can walk in their mother tongue.
about.f6_text: Designed to feel grounded and private — not noisy or trend-driven. A place for serious, daily return to biblical truth.

features.title: Every Tool You Need for Daily Faith
features.subtitle: Thirty-plus features built around one purpose: helping you return to Christ in ordinary daily life.
features.bible_text: Full Bible access with reading continuity and progress tracking. Open any book, continue where you left off, and build a daily reading habit.
features.prayer_text: Track prayer requests, record answered prayers, and build lasting habits of intercession. Your prayer history is private and personal.
features.reflection_text: Choose from faith, hope, courage, peace, forgiveness, family, gratitude, calling, and more. Guided reflection designed for real life.
features.ask_text: Premium members bring their own questions and receive Scripture-shaped guidance. Personal, specific, and rooted in biblical truth.
features.selah_text: Hymns, Psalms, instrumentals, and devotional reflection in one worship space. Sacred music for every hour of the day.
features.letgo_text: A quiet repentance-and-grace experience for laying what is heavy at the cross. Come as you are and leave lighter.
features.connected_text: Right Now Faith Help, Sermon Companion, Memory Verse Trainer, Decision Discernment, Geo-Prayer Missions, and more.
features.study_text: Ten Commandments, the Beatitudes, fasting guidance, heroes of faith, Bible quiz, Christian Calendar, and nearby church discovery.

journey.title: Morning. Midday. Evening.
journey.subtitle: VikingPal is built for all three movements of the day — not just a single moment of faith.
journey.morning_text: Open with Scripture, receive your daily reflection, and set your heart toward Christ before the day gains speed.
journey.midday_text: Step into a calmer place. Pause with prayer, check your reflection paths, or use Right Now Faith Help when life gets heavy.
journey.evening_text: Close with Psalms, journal your prayers, revisit Let Go, or end in Selah with hymns and quiet. Let the day end in peace.

verse.text: "Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged, for the Lord your God will be with you wherever you go."

plans.title: Begin with Grace. Rise with Premium.
plans.subtitle: Every believer deserves daily access to Scripture and reflection. Start free, and when you are ready — unlock the full hall.
plans.grace_desc: Download VikingPal and receive the full Grace experience. Scripture, daily reflection, prayer tracking, and core tools — at no cost.
plans.grace_f1: ✓   Full Bible reading with progress tracking
plans.premium_desc: Unlock the full hall. Ask VikingPal for personal Scripture-shaped guidance, access all Connected Features, and go deeper with every tool.
plans.note: ✦   Grace keeps the core experience accessible to every believer. Premium unlocks personal guidance and connected depth.

faq.title: Questions Before You Enter the Hall.
faq.a1: Yes. The Grace tier is included with the app at no cost. It gives you full Bible access, daily reflection, prayer tracking, 15 reflection paths, Selah, Let Go, and core study tools. Premium unlocks Ask VikingPal, Connected Features, and deeper personalization.
faq.a2: Ask VikingPal is a Premium AI guidance feature. Bring your real questions — struggles, decisions, doubts, or praise — and receive answers shaped by Scripture and Christian conviction, crafted personally for your situation.
faq.a3: Daily guidance, faith and trust, prayer reflection, patience and hope, forgiveness, mercy and compassion, faith and strength, grateful heart, life purpose, family, inner peace, wisdom, good character, resisting temptation, and evening rest.
faq.a4: Selah is VikingPal's worship space — bringing hymns, Psalms, instrumentals, and devotional reflection into one calm area. It's designed for morning worship, midday rest, or evening quiet before God.
faq.a5: Let Go is a quiet repentance-and-grace experience. When something is weighing on you — guilt, failure, heavy burden — Let Go walks you through laying it at the cross and receiving grace. It is one of the most personal features in the app.
faq.a6: VikingPal supports more than 100 locale options. The app is built to travel with believers in many different settings, cultures, and languages while remaining clearly rooted in Protestant Christian conviction.

download.title:
Available Now on
iOS and Android.
download.desc: Download VikingPal and begin your daily walk with Christ — Scripture, prayer, reflection, and worship in your pocket. The hall is open.

support.hero_subtitle: We are a small team and we care about every person who uses VikingPal. Find answers below, or reach us directly — we read every message.
support.about_title_html: Built with Care by OakDev & AI AB
support.about_p1: VikingPal is built by OakDev & AI AB, a small software company based in Uddevalla, Sweden. We are a team of developers and designers with a genuine passion for faith, history, and the intersection of the two.
support.about_p2: What began as an AI reflection app has grown into a complete Christian companion — built with reverence and care for the believers who use it every day.
support.about_p3: We approach this work with deep respect for Scripture and Christian tradition. Every feature, every word, and every design decision is made with your spiritual journey in mind.
support.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about VikingPal. Can't find your answer? Send us a message.

footer.tagline: Walk with Christ. The way of the Northern warrior.

delete.title: Delete Your Account
delete.subtitle: You have the right to permanently delete your account and all associated data at any time — no questions asked.
delete.warning_title: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
delete.warning_body: Deleting your account will permanently erase all your data, your Premium status, your prayer journal, and your reflection history. There is no grace period — once confirmed in the app, deletion begins immediately.
delete.methods_sub: The in-app method is the fastest and easiest.
delete.step1: Open the VikingPal app on your device.
delete.step2: Go to Settings (profile or menu area).
delete.step3: Scroll to the bottom of Settings.
delete.step5: Confirm the deletion. Your account and all data are permanently erased.
delete.estep3: Include the email address linked to your VikingPal account.
delete.estep4: We will process your request and confirm deletion within 30 days.
delete.data4: Your prayer journal and prayer history
delete.gdpr_body: As a user, you have the right to erasure ("right to be forgotten") under Article 17 of the GDPR. Deleting your account fully satisfies this right. If you have any questions about how your data is handled, please read our Privacy Policy or contact us at hello@oakdev.app.
delete.questions: Have questions or need help? We are here.
